WARNING: the following wellformedness checks failed!

Fact arity issues
=================

Same fact is used with different arities, i.e., Fact('A','B') is different from Fact('A'). 
Check the arguments of your facts.
  

  Fact `bar':

    1. Rule `R4', arity 1
         Bar( x )
    
    2. Rule `R5', arity 2
         Bar( x, x )
  
  Fact `foo':

    1. Rule `R1', arity 1
         Foo( x )
    
    2. Rule `R2', arity 2
         Foo( x, y )
    
    3. Rule `R3', arity 3
         Foo( x, x, x )
  

Facts occur in the left-hand-side but not in any right-hand-side 
=================================================================

  1. in rule "R1":  factName `Foo' arity: 1 multiplicity: Linear. Perhaps you want to use the fact in rule "R3":  factName `Foo' arity: 3 multiplicity: Linear
  
  2. in rule "R2":  factName `Foo' arity: 2 multiplicity: Linear. Perhaps you want to use the fact in rule "R3":  factName `Foo' arity: 3 multiplicity: Linear
  
  3. in rule "R4":  factName `Bar' arity: 1 multiplicity: Linear. Perhaps you want to use the fact in rule "R5":  factName `Bar' arity: 2 multiplicity: Linear
*/
